channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: NTSA Launches Smart Driving License Registration in Kimilili
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Muthoni
item.description: NTSA and Huduma Kenya have launched a five-day smart driving license registration drive in Kimilili to serve residents of Bungoma County.
